article.title: Microsoft PostgreSQL OSS engine team: reflecting on 2024 | Microsoft Community Hub

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | C++ | Database Internals | 19+ years exp | Postgres | MySQL | Rust

posts.text:
Excited to bring you a new blog: "Microsoft PostgreSQL OSS engine team: reflecting on 2024" (https://lnkd.in/gPthCzm9)

In this first part of a two part blog, you will learn about who the Microsoft PostgreSQL OSS Engine team is, their code contributions to upstream PostgreSQL, technical details behind those changes & their journey during 2024. 

In the second part which is coming soon, you will get a sneak preview of upcoming work in 2025 (and PG18 cycle) and more.

Thank you to the team: Andres Freund, Amit Langote, Ashutosh Bapat,  Daniel Gustafsson, David Rowley, Melanie Plageman, Mustafa Melih Mutlu, Nazır Bilal Yavuz, Rahila Syed, Thomas Munro & Tomas Vondra for all the  hard work and dedication you bring to PostgreSQL. Thank you to the amazing PostgreSQL development community for the great work, which makes PostgreSQL the best and the most loved database in the world. 

Thank you Claire Giordano, Teresa Giacomini for helping me polish the blog contents and Guy Bowerman for the final push to publish.

See you all soon with part 2: "Microsoft Postgres OSS engine team: previewing 2025" !

#PostgreSQL #OSS #Azure

article.title: This Entrepreneur Raised $36.5 Million To Secure Cloud-Stored Data From Hackers - Alejandro Cremades

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | C++ | Database Internals | 19+ years exp | Postgres | MySQL | Rust

posts.text:
(NEW EPISODE) In the heart of every successful venture lies a narrative, a tale of trials, triumphs, and the indefatigable spirit of its creator. Ameesh Divatia, a luminary figure in the tech industry, embodies this spirit, having navigated the tumultuous seas of entrepreneurship, weathered storms of uncertainty, and emerged as a beacon of innovation in cybersecurity.

In a candid interview, Ameesh unveiled the intricacies of his journey, offering insights, wisdom, and a glimpse into the ethos that propelled him forward.

#entrepreneurs #entrepreneurship #entrepreneur #business #success #venture #venturecapital #investment #invest #investors #tech #technology #innovation #leanstartup #leanstartups #inspiration #startup #startups

article.title: Cybersecurity's Future: Facing Post-Quantum Cryptography Peril

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | C++ | Database Internals | 19+ years exp | Postgres | MySQL | Rust

posts.text:
InformationWeek published an article on the future of cybersecurity and the impact of quantum computers.  The article asks some very relevant questions, including:
* How vulnerable organizations will become if they do not make such a transition (to post-quantum cryptography) fast enough? 
* Will it be open season on their data without quantum encryption? 
* Does the post-quantum future mean quantum encryption will be mandatory for even the most basic forms of cyber resilience?

Min-Hank Ho, our VP of Product Management, provides his perspective on these questions in the article
https://lnkd.in/dmKFWkCp

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | C++ | Database Internals | 19+ years exp | Postgres | MySQL | Rust

posts.text:

For our first episode, we asked Manoj Kohli, the Executive Chairman of SB Energy in India — to share the lessons he's learned from ancient Indian #wisdom and how he incorporates them into his daily life, his business and his relationships.
